title: HTML Lists Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the different types of lists in HTML.

questions.question: Which tag starts an unordered list (bulleted)?
Which tag starts an ordered list (numbered)?
What is the result of using the <li> tag?
options: It defines a single list item.
It starts a new list container.
It creates a link to a list.

questions.question: Which three tags are involved in creating a Description List?
Can you put a list inside another list (nested)?
options: Yes, it is possible by placing the inner list inside an <li> tag.
No, it is invalid in HTML.
Only if the inner list is of a different type.
